   618Ôćĺdef preserve_existing_import_timestamp(existing: dict[str, Any] | None, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
   619Ôćĺ    if existing is None:
   620Ôćĺ        return payload
   621Ôćĺ    if manifest_signature(existing) != manifest_signature(payload):
   622Ôćĺ        return payload
   623Ôćĺ    preserved = dict(payload)
   624Ôćĺ    imported_at = existing.get("imported_at")
   625Ôćĺ    if isinstance(imported_at, str) and imported_at:
   626Ôćĺ        preserved["imported_at"] = imported_at
   627Ôćĺ    return preserved
   628Ôćĺ
   629Ôćĺ
   630Ôćĺdef manifest_signature(payload: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
   631Ôćĺ    return {key: value for key, value in payload.items() if key != "imported_at"}

   634Ôćĺdef append_jsonl(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
   635Ôćĺ    with path.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as handle:

   639Ôćĺdef load_jsonl(path: Path) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
   640Ôćĺ    records: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
   641Ôćĺ    with path.open("r", encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore") as handle:
   642Ôćĺ        for line in handle:
   643Ôćĺ            line = line.strip()
   644Ôćĺ            if not line:
   645Ôćĺ                continue
   646Ôćĺ            try:
   647Ôćĺ                records.append(json.loads(line))
   648Ôćĺ            except json.JSONDecodeError:
   649Ôćĺ                continue
   650Ôćĺ    return records

   653Ôćĺdef load_json(path: Path) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
   654Ôćĺ    if not path.exists():
   655Ôćĺ        return None
   656Ôćĺ    try:
   657Ôćĺ        return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
   658Ôćĺ    except (OSError, json.JSONDecodeError):
   659Ôćĺ        return None

   662Ôćĺdef ensure_dict(value: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
   663Ôćĺ    return value if isinstance(value, dict) else {}
   664Ôćĺ
   665Ôćĺ
   666Ôćĺdef ensure_list(value: Any) -> list[Any]:
   667Ôćĺ    return value if isinstance(value, list) else []
   668Ôćĺ
   669Ôćĺ
   670Ôćĺdef get_nested(payload: dict[str, Any], *keys: str) -> Any:
   671Ôćĺ    current: Any = payload
   672Ôćĺ    for key in keys:
   673Ôćĺ        if not isinstance(current, dict):
   674Ôćĺ            return None
   675Ôćĺ        current = current.get(key)
   676Ôćĺ    return current

   678Ôćĺ
   679Ôćĺdef extract_text_blocks(blocks: Any) -> str:
   680Ôćĺ    parts: list[str] = []
   681Ôćĺ    for block in ensure_list(blocks):
   682Ôćĺ        if isinstance(block, str):
   683Ôćĺ            text = block.strip()
   684Ôćĺ            if text:
   685Ôćĺ                parts.append(text)
   686Ôćĺ            continue
   687Ôćĺ        if not isinstance(block, dict):
   688Ôćĺ            continue
   689Ôćĺ        block_type = str(block.get("type") or "").lower()
   690Ôćĺ        if block_type in SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES | TOOL_USE_TYPES | TOOL_RESULT_TYPES:
   691Ôćĺ            continue
   692Ôćĺ        if block_type in TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES:
   693Ôćĺ            text = str(block.get("text") or "").strip()
   694Ôćĺ            if text:
   695Ôćĺ                parts.append(text)
   696Ôćĺ            continue
   697Ôćĺ        fallback_text = extract_simple_text(block)
   698Ôćĺ        if fallback_text:
   699Ôćĺ            parts.append(fallback_text)
   700Ôćĺ    return join_paragraphs(parts)
   701Ôćĺ
   702Ôćĺ
   703Ôćĺdef extract_simple_text(value: Any) -> str:
   704Ôćĺ    if isinstance(value, str):
   705Ôćĺ        return value.strip()
   706Ôćĺ    if isinstance(value, list):
   707Ôćĺ        return join_paragraphs(extract_simple_text(item) for item in value)
   708Ôćĺ    if isinstance(value, dict):
   709Ôćĺ        for key in ("text", "content", "value"):
   710Ôćĺ            if key in value and isinstance(value[key], str):
   711Ôćĺ                return value[key].strip()
   712Ôćĺ        return ""
   713Ôćĺ    return ""
   714Ôćĺ
   715Ôćĺ
   716Ôćĺdef extract_gemini_text(node: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
   717Ôćĺ    parts: list[str] = []
   718Ôćĺ    for candidate in (node.get("parts"), node.get("content"), node.get("text"), node.get("message")):
   719Ôćĺ        parts.extend(extract_gemini_parts(candidate))
   720Ôćĺ    return join_paragraphs(parts)
   721Ôćĺ
   722Ôćĺ
   723Ôćĺdef extract_gemini_parts(value: Any) -> list[str]:
   724Ôćĺ    if isinstance(value, str):
   725Ôćĺ        text = value.strip()
   726Ôćĺ        return [text] if text else []
   727Ôćĺ    if isinstance(value, list):
   728Ôćĺ        parts: list[str] = []
   729Ôćĺ        for item in value:
   730Ôćĺ            parts.extend(extract_gemini_parts(item))
   731Ôćĺ        return parts
   732Ôćĺ    if isinstance(value, dict):
   733Ôćĺ        block_type = str(value.get("type") or "").lower()
   734Ôćĺ        if block_type in SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES | TOOL_USE_TYPES | TOOL_RESULT_TYPES:
   735Ôćĺ            return []
   736Ôćĺ        if "text" in value and isinstance(value["text"], str):
   737Ôćĺ            text = value["text"].strip()
   738Ôćĺ            return [text] if text else []
   739Ôćĺ        parts: list[str] = []
   740Ôćĺ        for key in ("parts", "content"):
   741Ôćĺ            if key in value:
   742Ôćĺ                parts.extend(extract_gemini_parts(value[key]))
   743Ôćĺ        return parts
   744Ôćĺ    return []
   745Ôćĺ
   746Ôćĺ
   747Ôćĺdef find_first_mapping_with_keys(value: Any, keys: set[str]) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
   748Ôćĺ    if isinstance(value, dict):
   749Ôćĺ        if keys & set(value.keys()):
   750Ôćĺ            return value
   751Ôćĺ        for candidate in value.values():
   752Ôćĺ            result = find_first_mapping_with_keys(candidate, keys)
   753Ôćĺ            if result is not None:
   754Ôćĺ                return result
   755Ôćĺ        return None
   756Ôćĺ    if isinstance(value, list):
   757Ôćĺ        for candidate in value:
   758Ôćĺ            result = find_first_mapping_with_keys(candidate, keys)
   759Ôćĺ            if result is not None:
   760Ôćĺ                return result
   761Ôćĺ    return None
   762Ôćĺ
   763Ôćĺ
   764Ôćĺdef normalize_timestamp(value: Any, fallback: str | None = None) -> str:
   765Ôćĺ    if isinstance(value, (int, float)):
   766Ôćĺ        return (
   767Ôćĺ            datetime.fromtimestamp(float(value), tz=timezone.utc)
   768Ôćĺ            .replace(microsecond=0)
   769Ôćĺ            .isoformat()
   770Ôćĺ            .replace("+00:00", "Z")
   771Ôćĺ        )
   772Ôćĺ    if isinstance(value, datetime):
   773Ôćĺ        normalized = value.astimezone(timezone.utc) if value.tzinfo else value
   774Ôćĺ        return normalized.replace(microsecond=0).isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
   775Ôćĺ    if isinstance(value, str):
   776Ôćĺ        text = value.strip()
   777Ôćĺ        if not text:
   778Ôćĺ            return fallback or normalize_timestamp(datetime.now(timezone.utc))
   779Ôćĺ        iso_candidate = text[:-1] + "+00:00" if text.endswith("Z") else text
   780Ôćĺ        try:
   781Ôćĺ            parsed = datetime.fromisoformat(iso_candidate)
   782Ôćĺ            if parsed.tzinfo is not None:
   783Ôćĺ                parsed = parsed.astimezone(timezone.utc)
   784Ôćĺ            return parsed.replace(microsecond=0).isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
   785Ôćĺ        except ValueError:
   786Ôćĺ            return text
   787Ôćĺ    return fallback or normalize_timestamp(datetime.now(timezone.utc))
   788Ôćĺ
   789Ôćĺ
   790Ôćĺdef earliest_timestamp(current: str, candidate: Any) -> str:
   791Ôćĺ    normalized = normalize_timestamp(candidate, current)
   792Ôćĺ    current_dt = parse_iso_timestamp(current)
   793Ôćĺ    normalized_dt = parse_iso_timestamp(normalized)
   794Ôćĺ    if current_dt is not None and normalized_dt is not None:
   795Ôćĺ        return normalized if normalized_dt < current_dt else current
   796Ôćĺ    if normalized_dt is not None:
   797Ôćĺ        return normalized
   798Ôćĺ    return current or normalized
   799Ôćĺ
   800Ôćĺ
   801Ôćĺdef parse_iso_timestamp(value: str) -> datetime | None:
   802Ôćĺ    if not value:
   803Ôćĺ        return None
   804Ôćĺ    candidate = value[:-1] + "+00:00" if value.endswith("Z") else value
   805Ôćĺ    try:
   806Ôćĺ        parsed = datetime.fromisoformat(candidate)
   807Ôćĺ    except ValueError:
   808Ôćĺ        return None
   809Ôćĺ    if parsed.tzinfo is None:
   810Ôćĺ        return parsed.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
   811Ôćĺ    return parsed.astimezone(timezone.utc)
   812Ôćĺ
   813Ôćĺ
   814Ôćĺdef timestamp_partition(timestamp: str) -> tuple[str, str]:
   815Ôćĺ    try:
   816Ôćĺ        candidate = timestamp[:-1] + "+00:00" if timestamp.endswith("Z") else timestamp
   817Ôćĺ        parsed = datetime.fromisoformat(candidate)
   818Ôćĺ        return parsed.strftime("%Y"), parsed.strftime("%m")
   819Ôćĺ    except ValueError:
   820Ôćĺ        return "unknown", "unknown"
   821Ôćĺ
   822Ôćĺ
   823Ôćĺdef join_paragraphs(parts: Any) -> str:
   824Ôćĺ    cleaned = [str(part).strip() for part in parts if str(part).strip()]
   825Ôćĺ    return "\n\n".join(cleaned)
   826Ôćĺ
   827Ôćĺ
   828Ôćĺdef summarize_value(value: Any, limit: int = 180) -> str:
   829Ôćĺ    if value is None:
   830Ôćĺ        return "none"
   831Ôćĺ    if isinstance(value, str):
   832Ôćĺ        text = " ".join(value.split())
   833Ôćĺ        return truncate(text, limit)
   834Ôćĺ    try:
   835Ôćĺ        text = json.dumps(value, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True)
   836Ôćĺ    except TypeError:
   837Ôćĺ        text = str(value)
   838Ôćĺ    text = " ".join(text.split())
   839Ôćĺ    return truncate(text, limit)
   840Ôćĺ
   841Ôćĺ
   842Ôćĺdef truncate(text: str, limit: int) -> str:
   843Ôćĺ    return text if len(text) <= limit else text[: limit - 3] + "..."
   844Ôćĺ
   845Ôćĺ
   846Ôćĺdef yaml_escape(value: str) -> str:
   847Ôćĺ    escaped = value.replace("\\", "\\\\").replace('"', '\\"').replace("\n", "\\n")
   848Ôćĺ    return f'"{escaped}"'
   849Ôćĺ
   850Ôćĺ
   851Ôćĺdef discover_source_files(clients: set[str] | None = None) -> list[tuple[str, Path]]:
   852Ôćĺ    requested = clients or CLIENTS
   853Ôćĺ    roots = default_client_roots()
   854Ôćĺ    patterns = {
   855Ôćĺ        "codex": ["sessions/**/*.jsonl"],
   856Ôćĺ        "claude": ["projects/**/*.jsonl"],
   857Ôćĺ        "gemini": [
   858Ôćĺ            "tmp/*/checkpoints/**/*.json",
   859Ôćĺ            "tmp/*/checkpoints/**/*.jsonl",
   860Ôćĺ            "history/**/*.json",
   861Ôćĺ            "history/**/*.jsonl",
   862Ôćĺ            "chats/**/*.json",
   863Ôćĺ            "chats/**/*.jsonl",
   864Ôćĺ        ],
   865Ôćĺ    }
   866Ôćĺ    matches: list[tuple[str, Path]] = []
   867Ôćĺ    seen: set[str] = set()
   868Ôćĺ    for client in sorted(requested):
   869Ôćĺ        root = roots.get(client)
   870Ôćĺ        if root is None or not root.exists():
   871Ôćĺ            continue
   872Ôćĺ        for pattern in patterns[client]:
   873Ôćĺ            for path in root.glob(pattern):
   874Ôćĺ                if not path.is_file():
   875Ôćĺ                    continue
   876Ôćĺ                key = path.resolve().as_posix().lower()
   877Ôćĺ                if key in seen:
   878Ôćĺ                    continue
   879Ôćĺ                seen.add(key)
   880Ôćĺ                matches.append((client, path.resolve()))
   881Ôćĺ    matches.sort(
   882Ôćĺ        key=lambda item: (safe_file_mtime(item[1]), item[1].as_posix().lower()),
   883Ôćĺ        reverse=True,
   884Ôćĺ    )
   885Ôćĺ    return matches
   886Ôćĺ
   887Ôćĺ
   888Ôćĺdef infer_project_slug(parsed: ParsedTranscript) -> str:
   889Ôćĺ    if parsed.cwd:
   890Ôćĺ        try:
   891Ôćĺ            cwd_path = Path(parsed.cwd)
   892Ôćĺ            return slugify(cwd_path.name, fallback="project")
   893Ôćĺ        except OSError:
   894Ôćĺ            pass
   895Ôćĺ    if parsed.client == "claude":
   896Ôćĺ        parent_name = parsed.source_path.parent.name
   897Ôćĺ        parent_name = re.sub(r"^[a-z]--", "", parent_name.lower())
   898Ôćĺ        return slugify(parent_name, fallback="project")
   899Ôćĺ    if parsed.client == "gemini" and parsed.source_path.parent.name:
   900Ôćĺ        return slugify(parsed.source_path.parent.name, fallback="project")
   901Ôćĺ    return "unknown-project"
   902Ôćĺ
   903Ôćĺ
   904Ôćĺdef transcript_matches_repo(parsed: ParsedTranscript, repo_root: Path, repo_slug: str) -> bool:
   905Ôćĺ    repo_root = repo_root.resolve()
   906Ôćĺ    if parsed.cwd:
   907Ôćĺ        try:
   908Ôćĺ            cwd_path = Path(parsed.cwd).resolve()
   909Ôćĺ            if cwd_path == repo_root:
   910Ôćĺ                return True
   911Ôćĺ            if repo_root in cwd_path.parents:
   912Ôćĺ                return True
   913Ôćĺ        except OSError:
   914Ôćĺ            pass
   915Ôćĺ    return project_slugs_match(infer_project_slug(parsed), repo_slug)
   916Ôćĺ
   917Ôćĺ
   918Ôćĺdef project_slugs_match(left: str, right: str) -> bool:
   919Ôćĺ    return bool(left and right and left == right and left != "unknown-project")
   920Ôćĺ
   921Ôćĺ
   922Ôćĺdef safe_file_mtime(path: Path) -> float:
   923Ôćĺ    try:
   924Ôćĺ        return path.stat().st_mtime
   925Ôćĺ    except OSError:
   926Ôćĺ        return 0.0
   927Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺfrom __future__ import annotations

    60Ôćĺdef slugify(value: str, fallback: str = "session") -> str:
    61Ôćĺ    ascii_value = value.encode("ascii", "ignore").decode("ascii").lower()
    62Ôćĺ    slug = re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9._-]+", "-", ascii_value).strip("-._")
    63Ôćĺ    return slug or fallback

    66Ôćĺdef sha256_file(path: Path) -> str:
    67Ôćĺ    digest = hashlib.sha256()
    68Ôćĺ    with path.open("rb") as handle:
    69Ôćĺ        for chunk in iter(lambda: handle.read(1024 * 1024), b""):
    70Ôćĺ            digest.update(chunk)
    71Ôćĺ    return digest.hexdigest()

    73Ôćĺ
    74Ôćĺdef infer_client(client: str, source: Path) -> str:
    75Ôćĺ    if client != "auto":
    76Ôćĺ        return client
    77Ôćĺ    normalized = source.as_posix().lower()
    78Ôćĺ    if "/.codex/" in normalized or "rollout-" in source.name.lower():
    79Ôćĺ        return "codex"
    80Ôćĺ    if "/.claude/" in normalized or "/projects/" in normalized:
    81Ôćĺ        return "claude"
    82Ôćĺ    if "/.gemini/" in normalized or "checkpoint" in normalized:
    83Ôćĺ        return "gemini"
    84Ôćĺ    raise SystemExit(f"could not infer transcript client from source path: {source}")

    87Ôćĺdef parse_transcript(client: str, source: Path) -> ParsedTranscript:
    88Ôćĺ    if client == "codex":
    89Ôćĺ        return parse_codex_transcript(source)
    90Ôćĺ    if client == "claude":
    91Ôćĺ        return parse_claude_transcript(source)
    92Ôćĺ    if client == "gemini":
    93Ôćĺ        return parse_gemini_transcript(source)
    94Ôćĺ    raise SystemExit(f"unsupported transcript client: {client}")

    97Ôćĺdef parse_codex_transcript(path: Path) -> ParsedTranscript:
    98Ôćĺ    records = load_jsonl(path)
    99Ôćĺ    session_id = path.stem
   100Ôćĺ    title = path.stem
   101Ôćĺ    started_at = normalize_timestamp(path.stat().st_mtime)
   102Ôćĺ    cwd = ""
   103Ôćĺ    branch = ""
   104Ôćĺ    messages: list[TranscriptMessage] = []
   105Ôćĺ    tool_events: list[TranscriptToolEvent] = []
   106Ôćĺ
   107Ôćĺ    for record in records:
   108Ôćĺ        record_type = str(record.get("type") or "")
   109Ôćĺ        timestamp = normalize_timestamp(record.get("timestamp"), started_at)
   110Ôćĺ        if record_type == "session_meta":
   111Ôćĺ            payload = ensure_dict(record.get("payload"))
   112Ôćĺ            session_id = str(payload.get("id") or session_id)
   113Ôćĺ            title = str(payload.get("thread_name") or payload.get("title") or title)
   114Ôćĺ            started_at = earliest_timestamp(started_at, payload.get("timestamp"))
   115Ôćĺ            cwd = str(payload.get("cwd") or cwd)
   116Ôćĺ            branch = str(get_nested(payload, "git", "branch") or branch)
   117Ôćĺ            continue
   118Ôćĺ
   119Ôćĺ        if record_type not in {"response_item", "event_msg"}:
   120Ôćĺ            continue
   121Ôćĺ
   122Ôćĺ        payload = ensure_dict(record.get("payload"))
   123Ôćĺ        payload_type = str(payload.get("type") or "")
   124Ôćĺ        if payload_type == "message":
   125Ôćĺ            role = str(payload.get("role") or "").lower()
   126Ôćĺ            if role in {"user", "assistant"}:
   127Ôćĺ                text = extract_text_blocks(payload.get("content"))
   128Ôćĺ                if text:
   129Ôćĺ                    messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))
   130Ôćĺ            continue
   131Ôćĺ
   132Ôćĺ        if payload_type in {"user_message", "agent_message"}:
   133Ôćĺ            role = "user" if payload_type == "user_message" else "assistant"
   134Ôćĺ            text = str(payload.get("message") or "").strip()
   135Ôćĺ            if text:
   136Ôćĺ                messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))
   137Ôćĺ            continue
   138Ôćĺ
   139Ôćĺ        if payload_type == "function_call":
   140Ôćĺ            name = str(payload.get("name") or "function_call")
   141Ôćĺ            arguments = payload.get("arguments") or payload.get("input")
   142Ôćĺ            tool_events.append(
   143Ôćĺ                TranscriptToolEvent(
   144Ôćĺ                    summary=f"{name} input={summarize_value(arguments)}",
   145Ôćĺ                    timestamp=timestamp,
   146Ôćĺ                )
   147Ôćĺ            )
   148Ôćĺ            continue
   149Ôćĺ
   150Ôćĺ        if payload_type == "custom_tool_call":
   151Ôćĺ            name = str(payload.get("name") or payload.get("call_id") or "custom_tool_call")
   152Ôćĺ            tool_events.append(
   153Ôćĺ                TranscriptToolEvent(
   154Ôćĺ                    summary=f"{name} input={summarize_value(payload.get('input'))}",
   155Ôćĺ                    timestamp=timestamp,
   156Ôćĺ                )
   157Ôćĺ            )
   158Ôćĺ            continue
   159Ôćĺ
   160Ôćĺ        if payload_type == "function_call_output":
   161Ôćĺ            name = str(payload.get("name") or payload.get("call_id") or "function_call_output")
   162Ôćĺ            output = payload.get("output") or payload.get("content")
   163Ôćĺ            tool_events.append(
   164Ôćĺ                TranscriptToolEvent(
   165Ôćĺ                    summary=f"{name} output={summarize_value(output)}",
   166Ôćĺ                    timestamp=timestamp,
   167Ôćĺ                )
   168Ôćĺ            )
   169Ôćĺ            continue
   170Ôćĺ
   171Ôćĺ        if payload_type == "custom_tool_call_output":
   172Ôćĺ            name = str(payload.get("name") or payload.get("call_id") or "custom_tool_call_output")
   173Ôćĺ            output = payload.get("output") or payload.get("content")
   174Ôćĺ            tool_events.append(
   175Ôćĺ                TranscriptToolEvent(
   176Ôćĺ                    summary=f"{name} output={summarize_value(output)}",
   177Ôćĺ                    timestamp=timestamp,
   178Ôćĺ                )
   179Ôćĺ            )
   180Ôćĺ
   181Ôćĺ    return ParsedTranscript(
   182Ôćĺ        client="codex",
   183Ôćĺ        session_id=session_id,

   185Ôćĺ        started_at=started_at,
   186Ôćĺ        cwd=cwd,

   188Ôćĺ        messages=messages,

   194Ôćĺdef parse_claude_transcript(path: Path) -> ParsedTranscript:
   195Ôćĺ    records = load_jsonl(path)
   196Ôćĺ    session_id = path.stem
   197Ôćĺ    title = path.stem
   198Ôćĺ    started_at = normalize_timestamp(path.stat().st_mtime)
   199Ôćĺ    cwd = ""
   200Ôćĺ    branch = ""
   201Ôćĺ    messages: list[TranscriptMessage] = []
   202Ôćĺ    tool_events: list[TranscriptToolEvent] = []
   203Ôćĺ
   204Ôćĺ    for record in records:
   205Ôćĺ        record_type = str(record.get("type") or "")
   206Ôćĺ        timestamp = normalize_timestamp(record.get("timestamp"), started_at)
   207Ôćĺ        session_id = str(record.get("sessionId") or session_id)
   208Ôćĺ        started_at = earliest_timestamp(started_at, record.get("timestamp"))
   209Ôćĺ        cwd = str(record.get("cwd") or cwd)
   210Ôćĺ        branch = str(record.get("gitBranch") or branch)
   211Ôćĺ
   212Ôćĺ        if record_type not in {"user", "assistant"}:
   213Ôćĺ            continue
   214Ôćĺ
   215Ôćĺ        message = ensure_dict(record.get("message"))
   216Ôćĺ        role = str(message.get("role") or record_type).lower()
   217Ôćĺ        text_parts: list[str] = []
   218Ôćĺ        content = message.get("content")
   219Ôćĺ        if isinstance(content, str):
   220Ôćĺ            text = content.strip()
   221Ôćĺ            if role in {"user", "assistant"} and text:
   222Ôćĺ                messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))
   223Ôćĺ            continue
   224Ôćĺ
   225Ôćĺ        for block in ensure_list(content):
   226Ôćĺ            if isinstance(block, str):
   227Ôćĺ                if block.strip():
   228Ôćĺ                    text_parts.append(block.strip())
   229Ôćĺ                continue
   230Ôćĺ            if not isinstance(block, dict):
   231Ôćĺ                continue
   232Ôćĺ            block_type = str(block.get("type") or "").lower()
   233Ôćĺ            if block_type in TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES:
   234Ôćĺ                text = str(block.get("text") or "").strip()
   235Ôćĺ                if text:
   236Ôćĺ                    text_parts.append(text)
   237Ôćĺ                continue
   238Ôćĺ            if block_type in SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES:
   239Ôćĺ                continue
   240Ôćĺ            if block_type in TOOL_USE_TYPES:
   241Ôćĺ                name = str(block.get("name") or "tool_use")
   242Ôćĺ                tool_events.append(
   243Ôćĺ                    TranscriptToolEvent(
   244Ôćĺ                        summary=f"{name} input={summarize_value(block.get('input'))}",
   245Ôćĺ                        timestamp=timestamp,
   246Ôćĺ                    )
   247Ôćĺ                )
   248Ôćĺ                continue
   249Ôćĺ            if block_type in TOOL_RESULT_TYPES:
   250Ôćĺ                tool_use_id = str(block.get("tool_use_id") or "tool_result")
   251Ôćĺ                tool_events.append(
   252Ôćĺ                    TranscriptToolEvent(
   253Ôćĺ                        summary=f"{tool_use_id} output={summarize_value(block.get('content'))}",
   254Ôćĺ                        timestamp=timestamp,
   255Ôćĺ                    )
   256Ôćĺ                )
   257Ôćĺ
   258Ôćĺ        text = join_paragraphs(text_parts)
   259Ôćĺ        if role in {"user", "assistant"} and text:
   260Ôćĺ            messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))
   261Ôćĺ
   262Ôćĺ    return ParsedTranscript(
   263Ôćĺ        client="claude",
   264Ôćĺ        session_id=session_id,
   265Ôćĺ        title=title,
   266Ôćĺ        started_at=started_at,
   267Ôćĺ        cwd=cwd,
   268Ôćĺ        branch=branch,
   269Ôćĺ        messages=messages,
   270Ôćĺ        tool_events=tool_events,
   271Ôćĺ        source_path=path,
   272Ôćĺ    )
   273Ôćĺ

   275Ôćĺdef parse_gemini_transcript(path: Path) -> ParsedTranscript:
   276Ôćĺ    session_id = path.stem
   277Ôćĺ    title = path.stem
   278Ôćĺ    started_at = normalize_timestamp(path.stat().st_mtime)
   279Ôćĺ    cwd = ""
   280Ôćĺ    branch = ""
   281Ôćĺ    messages: list[TranscriptMessage] = []
   282Ôćĺ    tool_events: list[TranscriptToolEvent] = []
   283Ôćĺ
   284Ôćĺ    if path.suffix.lower() == ".jsonl":
   285Ôćĺ        payload: Any = load_jsonl(path)
   286Ôćĺ    else:
   287Ôćĺ        payload = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
   288Ôćĺ
   289Ôćĺ    message_signatures: set[tuple[str, str, str | None]] = set()
   290Ôćĺ    first_meta = find_first_mapping_with_keys(payload, {"sessionId", "chatId", "cwd", "branch", "timestamp"})
   291Ôćĺ    if first_meta:
   292Ôćĺ        session_id = str(first_meta.get("sessionId") or first_meta.get("chatId") or first_meta.get("id") or session_id)
   293Ôćĺ        started_at = earliest_timestamp(started_at, first_meta.get("timestamp"))
   294Ôćĺ        cwd = str(first_meta.get("cwd") or first_meta.get("projectRoot") or cwd)
   295Ôćĺ        branch = str(first_meta.get("branch") or branch)
   296Ôćĺ
   297Ôćĺ    def visit(node: Any) -> None:
   298Ôćĺ        nonlocal session_id, started_at, cwd, branch
   299Ôćĺ        if isinstance(node, list):
   300Ôćĺ            for item in node:
   301Ôćĺ                visit(item)
   302Ôćĺ            return
   303Ôćĺ        if not isinstance(node, dict):
   304Ôćĺ            return
   305Ôćĺ
   306Ôćĺ        session_id = str(node.get("sessionId") or node.get("chatId") or node.get("id") or session_id)
   307Ôćĺ        started_at = earliest_timestamp(started_at, node.get("timestamp"))
   308Ôćĺ        cwd = str(node.get("cwd") or node.get("projectRoot") or cwd)
   309Ôćĺ        branch = str(node.get("branch") or branch)
   310Ôćĺ
   311Ôćĺ        role = str(node.get("role") or node.get("author") or node.get("sender") or "").lower()
   312Ôćĺ        timestamp = normalize_timestamp(node.get("timestamp"), started_at)
   313Ôćĺ        if role in {"user", "assistant", "model"}:
   314Ôćĺ            normalized_role = "assistant" if role == "model" else role
   315Ôćĺ            text = extract_gemini_text(node)
   316Ôćĺ            signature = (normalized_role, text, timestamp)
   317Ôćĺ            if text and signature not in message_signatures:
   318Ôćĺ                message_signatures.add(signature)
   319Ôćĺ                messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=normalized_role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))
   320Ôćĺ
   321Ôćĺ        tool_name = (
   322Ôćĺ            get_nested(node, "toolUse", "name")
   323Ôćĺ            or node.get("toolName")
   324Ôćĺ            or node.get("functionName")
   325Ôćĺ            or node.get("tool")
   326Ôćĺ        )
   327Ôćĺ        if tool_name:
   328Ôćĺ            tool_events.append(
   329Ôćĺ                TranscriptToolEvent(
   330Ôćĺ                    summary=f"{tool_name} input={summarize_value(node.get('args') or node.get('input'))}",
   331Ôćĺ                    timestamp=timestamp,
   332Ôćĺ                )
   333Ôćĺ            )
   334Ôćĺ
   335Ôćĺ        for value in node.values():
   336Ôćĺ            visit(value)
   337Ôćĺ
   338Ôćĺ    visit(payload)
   339Ôćĺ
   340Ôćĺ    return ParsedTranscript(
   341Ôćĺ        client="gemini",
   342Ôćĺ        session_id=session_id,
   343Ôćĺ        title=title,
   344Ôćĺ        started_at=started_at,
   345Ôćĺ        cwd=cwd,
   346Ôćĺ        branch=branch,
   347Ôćĺ        messages=messages,
   348Ôćĺ        tool_events=tool_events,
   349Ôćĺ        source_path=path,
   350Ôćĺ    )
   351Ôćĺ
   352Ôćĺ
   353Ôćĺdef import_transcript(
   354Ôćĺ    parsed: ParsedTranscript,
   355Ôćĺ    root: Path,
   356Ôćĺ    global_root: Path,
   357Ôćĺ    project_slug: str,
   358Ôćĺ    raw_upload_permission: str,
   359Ôćĺ    mirror_to_repo: bool = True,
   360Ôćĺ) -> dict[str, Any]:
   361Ôćĺ    imported_at = normalize_timestamp(datetime.now(timezone.utc))
   362Ôćĺ    raw_sha256 = sha256_file(parsed.source_path)
   363Ôćĺ    session_label = slugify(parsed.session_id, fallback=slugify(parsed.source_path.stem, fallback="session"))
   364Ôćĺ    artifact_stem = f"{session_label}__{raw_sha256[:8]}"
   365Ôćĺ    source_suffix = parsed.source_path.suffix or ".txt"
   366Ôćĺ
   367Ôćĺ    year_token, month_token = timestamp_partition(parsed.started_at or imported_at)
   368Ôćĺ
   369Ôćĺ    repo_root = root / "Memory" / "06_transcripts"
   370Ôćĺ    repo_raw_path = repo_root / "raw" / parsed.client / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}{source_suffix}"
   371Ôćĺ    repo_clean_path = repo_root / "clean" / parsed.client / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}.md"
   372Ôćĺ    repo_manifest_path = repo_root / "manifests" / parsed.client / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}.json"
   373Ôćĺ
   374Ôćĺ    global_raw_path = global_root / "raw" / parsed.client / project_slug / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}{source_suffix}"
   375Ôćĺ    global_clean_path = global_root / "clean" / parsed.client / project_slug / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}.md"
   376Ôćĺ    global_manifest_path = global_root / "index" / "manifests" / parsed.client / project_slug / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}.json"
   377Ôćĺ    global_event_log_path = global_root / "index" / "sessions.jsonl"
   378Ôćĺ    global_db_path = global_root / "index" / "search.sqlite"
   379Ôćĺ
   380Ôćĺ    for path in (
   381Ôćĺ        global_raw_path,
   382Ôćĺ        global_clean_path,
   383Ôćĺ        global_manifest_path,
   384Ôćĺ        global_event_log_path,
   385Ôćĺ        global_db_path,
   386Ôćĺ    ):
   387Ôćĺ        path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   388Ôćĺ    if mirror_to_repo:
   389Ôćĺ        for path in (repo_raw_path, repo_clean_path, repo_manifest_path):
   390Ôćĺ            path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   391Ôćĺ
   392Ôćĺ    if mirror_to_repo:
   393Ôćĺ        copy_file(parsed.source_path, repo_raw_path)
   394Ôćĺ    copy_file(parsed.source_path, global_raw_path)
   395Ôćĺ
   396Ôćĺ    manifest = {
   397Ôćĺ        "client": parsed.client,
   398Ôćĺ        "project": project_slug,
   399Ôćĺ        "session_id": parsed.session_id,
   400Ôćĺ        "title": parsed.title,
   401Ôćĺ        "started_at": parsed.started_at,
   402Ôćĺ        "imported_at": imported_at,
   403Ôćĺ        "cwd": parsed.cwd,
   404Ôćĺ        "branch": parsed.branch,
   405Ôćĺ        "raw_source_path": parsed.source_path.as_posix(),
   406Ôćĺ        "raw_sha256": raw_sha256,
   407Ôćĺ        "raw_upload_permission": raw_upload_permission,
   408Ôćĺ        "repo_raw_path": repo_raw_path.relative_to(root).as_posix() if mirror_to_repo else "",
   409Ôćĺ        "repo_clean_path": repo_clean_path.relative_to(root).as_posix() if mirror_to_repo else "",
   410Ôćĺ        "repo_manifest_path": repo_manifest_path.relative_to(root).as_posix() if mirror_to_repo else "",
   411Ôćĺ        "global_raw_path": global_raw_path.as_posix(),
   412Ôćĺ        "global_clean_path": global_clean_path.as_posix(),
   413Ôćĺ        "global_manifest_path": global_manifest_path.as_posix(),
   414Ôćĺ        "message_count": len(parsed.messages),
   415Ôćĺ        "tool_event_count": len(parsed.tool_events),
   416Ôćĺ        "cleaning_mode": "deterministic-code",
   417Ôćĺ        "repo_mirror_enabled": mirror_to_repo,
   418Ôćĺ    }
   419Ôćĺ    existing_global_manifest = load_json(global_manifest_path)
   420Ôćĺ    manifest = preserve_existing_import_timestamp(existing_global_manifest, manifest)
   421Ôćĺ
   422Ôćĺ    if mirror_to_repo:
   423Ôćĺ        write_clean_markdown(parsed, manifest, repo_clean_path)
   424Ôćĺ    write_clean_markdown(parsed, manifest, global_clean_path)
   425Ôćĺ    if mirror_to_repo:
   426Ôćĺ        write_json(repo_manifest_path, manifest)
   427Ôćĺ    append_to_event_log = existing_global_manifest is None or existing_global_manifest != manifest
   428Ôćĺ    write_json(global_manifest_path, manifest)
   429Ôćĺ    if append_to_event_log:
   430Ôćĺ        append_jsonl(global_event_log_path, manifest)
   431Ôćĺ    upsert_search_index(global_db_path, manifest)
   432Ôćĺ
   433Ôćĺ    result = dict(manifest)
   434Ôćĺ    result["global_index_db"] = global_db_path.as_posix()
   435Ôćĺ    return result
   436Ôćĺ

   438Ôćĺdef write_clean_markdown(parsed: ParsedTranscript, manifest: dict[str, Any], path: Path) -> None:
   439Ôćĺ    lines = [
   440Ôćĺ        "---",
   441Ôćĺ        f"client: {manifest['client']}",
   442Ôćĺ        f"project: {manifest['project']}",
   443Ôćĺ        f"session_id: {manifest['session_id']}",
   444Ôćĺ        f"title: {yaml_escape(manifest['title'])}",
   445Ôćĺ        f"started_at: {manifest['started_at']}",
   446Ôćĺ        f"imported_at: {manifest['imported_at']}",
   447Ôćĺ        f"cwd: {yaml_escape(manifest['cwd'])}",
   448Ôćĺ        f"branch: {yaml_escape(manifest['branch'])}",
   449Ôćĺ        f"raw_source_path: {yaml_escape(manifest['raw_source_path'])}",
   450Ôćĺ        f"raw_sha256: {manifest['raw_sha256']}",
   451Ôćĺ        f"raw_upload_permission: {manifest['raw_upload_permission']}",
   452Ôćĺ        f"cleaning_mode: {manifest['cleaning_mode']}",
   453Ôćĺ        "---",
   454Ôćĺ        "",
   455Ôćĺ        f"# {manifest['title'] or manifest['session_id']}",
   456Ôćĺ        "",
   457Ôćĺ        "## Metadata",
   458Ôćĺ        f"- Client: `{manifest['client']}`",
   459Ôćĺ        f"- Project: `{manifest['project']}`",
   460Ôćĺ        f"- Session ID: `{manifest['session_id']}`",
   461Ôćĺ        f"- Started At: `{manifest['started_at']}`",
   462Ôćĺ        f"- Imported At: `{manifest['imported_at']}`",
   463Ôćĺ        f"- Raw SHA256: `{manifest['raw_sha256']}`",
   464Ôćĺ        f"- Raw Source: `{manifest['raw_source_path']}`",
   465Ôćĺ        f"- Repo Raw Path: `{manifest['repo_raw_path']}`",
   466Ôćĺ        f"- Repo Clean Path: `{manifest['repo_clean_path']}`",
   467Ôćĺ        "",
   468Ôćĺ        "## Messages",
   469Ôćĺ    ]
   470Ôćĺ
   471Ôćĺ    if parsed.messages:
   472Ôćĺ        for index, message in enumerate(parsed.messages, start=1):
   473Ôćĺ            lines.extend(
   474Ôćĺ                [
   475Ôćĺ                    f"### {index}. {message.role}",
   476Ôćĺ                    f"- Timestamp: `{message.timestamp or manifest['started_at']}`",
   477Ôćĺ                    "",
   478Ôćĺ                    message.text,
   479Ôćĺ                    "",
   480Ôćĺ                ]
   481Ôćĺ            )
   482Ôćĺ    else:
   483Ôćĺ        lines.extend(
   484Ôćĺ            [
   485Ôćĺ                "No user or assistant messages were extracted deterministically from the source transcript.",
   486Ôćĺ                "",
   487Ôćĺ            ]
   488Ôćĺ        )
   489Ôćĺ
   490Ôćĺ    lines.append("## Tool Events")
   491Ôćĺ    if parsed.tool_events:
   492Ôćĺ        for event in parsed.tool_events:
   493Ôćĺ            lines.append(f"- `{event.timestamp or manifest['started_at']}` {event.summary}")
   494Ôćĺ    else:
   495Ôćĺ        lines.append("- No tool events were extracted.")
   496Ôćĺ    lines.append("")
   497Ôćĺ
   498Ôćĺ    path.write_text("\n".join(lines), encoding="utf-8")
   499Ôćĺ

   501Ôćĺdef upsert_search_index(db_path: Path, manifest: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
   502Ôćĺ    conn = sqlite3.connect(db_path)
   503Ôćĺ    try:
   504Ôćĺ        conn.execute("PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL")
   505Ôćĺ        conn.execute(
   506Ôćĺ            """
   507Ôćĺ            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS transcripts (
   508Ôćĺ                client TEXT NOT NULL,
   509Ôćĺ                project TEXT NOT NULL,
   510Ôćĺ                session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
   511Ôćĺ                raw_sha256 TEXT NOT NULL,
   512Ôćĺ                title TEXT NOT NULL,
   513Ôćĺ                started_at TEXT NOT NULL,
   514Ôćĺ                imported_at TEXT NOT NULL,
   515Ôćĺ                cwd TEXT NOT NULL,
   516Ôćĺ                branch TEXT NOT NULL,
   517Ôćĺ                raw_source_path TEXT NOT NULL,
   518Ôćĺ                raw_upload_permission TEXT NOT NULL,
   519Ôćĺ                global_raw_path TEXT NOT NULL,
   520Ôćĺ                global_clean_path TEXT NOT NULL,
   521Ôćĺ                repo_raw_path TEXT NOT NULL,
   522Ôćĺ                repo_clean_path TEXT NOT NULL,
   523Ôćĺ                repo_manifest_path TEXT NOT NULL,
   524Ôćĺ                message_count INTEGER NOT NULL,
   525Ôćĺ                tool_event_count INTEGER NOT NULL,
   526Ôćĺ                PRIMARY KEY (client, project, session_id, raw_sha256)
   527Ôćĺ            )
   528Ôćĺ            """
   529Ôćĺ        )
   530Ôćĺ        conn.execute(
   531Ôćĺ            """
   532Ôćĺ            INSERT INTO transcripts (
   533Ôćĺ                client,
   534Ôćĺ                project,
   535Ôćĺ                session_id,
   536Ôćĺ                raw_sha256,
   537Ôćĺ                title,
   538Ôćĺ                started_at,
   539Ôćĺ                imported_at,
   540Ôćĺ                cwd,
   541Ôćĺ                branch,
   542Ôćĺ                raw_source_path,
   543Ôćĺ                raw_upload_permission,
   544Ôćĺ                global_raw_path,
   545Ôćĺ                global_clean_path,
   546Ôćĺ                repo_raw_path,
   547Ôćĺ                repo_clean_path,
   548Ôćĺ                repo_manifest_path,
   549Ôćĺ                message_count,
   550Ôćĺ                tool_event_count
   551Ôćĺ            ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
   552Ôćĺ            ON CONFLICT(client, project, session_id, raw_sha256) DO UPDATE SET
   553Ôćĺ                title = excluded.title,
   554Ôćĺ                started_at = excluded.started_at,
   555Ôćĺ                imported_at = excluded.imported_at,
   556Ôćĺ                cwd = excluded.cwd,
   557Ôćĺ                branch = excluded.branch,
   558Ôćĺ                raw_source_path = excluded.raw_source_path,
   559Ôćĺ                raw_upload_permission = excluded.raw_upload_permission,
   560Ôćĺ                global_raw_path = excluded.global_raw_path,
   561Ôćĺ                global_clean_path = excluded.global_clean_path,
   562Ôćĺ                repo_raw_path = excluded.repo_raw_path,
   563Ôćĺ                repo_clean_path = excluded.repo_clean_path,
   564Ôćĺ                repo_manifest_path = excluded.repo_manifest_path,
   565Ôćĺ                message_count = excluded.message_count,
   566Ôćĺ                tool_event_count = excluded.tool_event_count
   567Ôćĺ            """,
   568Ôćĺ            (
   569Ôćĺ                manifest["client"],
   570Ôćĺ                manifest["project"],
   571Ôćĺ                manifest["session_id"],
   572Ôćĺ                manifest["raw_sha256"],
   573Ôćĺ                manifest["title"],
   574Ôćĺ                manifest["started_at"],
   575Ôćĺ                manifest["imported_at"],
   576Ôćĺ                manifest["cwd"],
   577Ôćĺ                manifest["branch"],
   578Ôćĺ                manifest["raw_source_path"],
   579Ôćĺ                manifest["raw_upload_permission"],
   580Ôćĺ                manifest["global_raw_path"],
   581Ôćĺ                manifest["global_clean_path"],
   582Ôćĺ                manifest["repo_raw_path"],
   583Ôćĺ                manifest["repo_clean_path"],
   584Ôćĺ                manifest["repo_manifest_path"],
   585Ôćĺ                manifest["message_count"],
   586Ôćĺ                manifest["tool_event_count"],
   587Ôćĺ            ),
   588Ôćĺ        )
   589Ôćĺ        conn.commit()
   590Ôćĺ    finally:
   591Ôćĺ        conn.close()

   594Ôćĺdef copy_file(source: Path, destination: Path) -> None:
   595Ôćĺ    if source.resolve() == destination.resolve():
   596Ôćĺ        return
   597Ôćĺ    shutil.copy2(source, destination)

   604Ôćĺdef write_json(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> None:

   608Ôćĺdef manifest_changed(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> bool:
   609Ôćĺ    if not path.exists():
   610Ôćĺ        return True
   611Ôćĺ    try:
   612Ôćĺ        current = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
   613Ôćĺ    except (OSError, json.JSONDecodeError):
   614Ôćĺ        return True
   615Ôćĺ    return current != payload

   618Ôćĺdef preserve_existing_import_timestamp(existing: dict[str, Any] | None, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
   619Ôćĺ    if existing is None:
   620Ôćĺ        return payload
   621Ôćĺ    if manifest_signature(existing) != manifest_signature(payload):
   622Ôćĺ        return payload
   623Ôćĺ    preserved = dict(payload)
   624Ôćĺ    imported_at = existing.get("imported_at")
   625Ôćĺ    if isinstance(imported_at, str) and imported_at:
   626Ôćĺ        preserved["imported_at"] = imported_at
   627Ôćĺ    return preserved
   628Ôćĺ
   629Ôćĺ
   630Ôćĺdef manifest_signature(payload: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
   631Ôćĺ    return {key: value for key, value in payload.items() if key != "imported_at"}
   632Ôćĺ
   633Ôćĺ
   634Ôćĺdef append_jsonl(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
   635Ôćĺ    with path.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
   636Ôćĺ        handle.write(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n")
   637Ôćĺ
   638Ôćĺ
   639Ôćĺdef load_jsonl(path: Path) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
   640Ôćĺ    records: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
   641Ôćĺ    with path.open("r", encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore") as handle:
   642Ôćĺ        for line in handle:
   643Ôćĺ            line = line.strip()
   644Ôćĺ            if not line:
   645Ôćĺ                continue
   646Ôćĺ            try:
   647Ôćĺ                records.append(json.loads(line))
   648Ôćĺ            except json.JSONDecodeError:
   649Ôćĺ                continue
   650Ôćĺ    return records
   651Ôćĺ
   652Ôćĺ
   653Ôćĺdef load_json(path: Path) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
   654Ôćĺ    if not path.exists():
   655Ôćĺ        return None
   656Ôćĺ    try:
   657Ôćĺ        return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
   658Ôćĺ    except (OSError, json.JSONDecodeError):
   659Ôćĺ        return None
   660Ôćĺ
   661Ôćĺ
   662Ôćĺdef ensure_dict(value: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
   663Ôćĺ    return value if isinstance(value, dict) else {}
   664Ôćĺ
   665Ôćĺ
   666Ôćĺdef ensure_list(value: Any) -> list[Any]:
   667Ôćĺ    return value if isinstance(value, list) else []
   668Ôćĺ
   669Ôćĺ
   670Ôćĺdef get_nested(payload: dict[str, Any], *keys: str) -> Any:
   671Ôćĺ    current: Any = payload
   672Ôćĺ    for key in keys:
   673Ôćĺ        if not isinstance(current, dict):
   674Ôćĺ            return None
   675Ôćĺ        current = current.get(key)
   676Ôćĺ    return current
   677Ôćĺ
   678Ôćĺ
   679Ôćĺdef extract_text_blocks(blocks: Any) -> str:
   680Ôćĺ    parts: list[str] = []
   681Ôćĺ    for block in ensure_list(blocks):
   682Ôćĺ        if isinstance(block, str):
   683Ôćĺ            text = block.strip()
   684Ôćĺ            if text:
   685Ôćĺ                parts.append(text)
   686Ôćĺ            continue
   687Ôćĺ        if not isinstance(block, dict):
   688Ôćĺ            continue
   689Ôćĺ        block_type = str(block.get("type") or "").lower()
   690Ôćĺ        if block_type in SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES | TOOL_USE_TYPES | TOOL_RESULT_TYPES:
   691Ôćĺ            continue
   692Ôćĺ        if block_type in TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES:
   693Ôćĺ            text = str(block.get("text") or "").strip()
   694Ôćĺ            if text:
   695Ôćĺ                parts.append(text)
   696Ôćĺ            continue
   697Ôćĺ        fallback_text = extract_simple_text(block)
   698Ôćĺ        if fallback_text:
   699Ôćĺ            parts.append(fallback_text)
   700Ôćĺ    return join_paragraphs(parts)
   701Ôćĺ
   702Ôćĺ
   703Ôćĺdef extract_simple_text(value: Any) -> str:
   704Ôćĺ    if isinstance(value, str):
   705Ôćĺ        return value.strip()
   706Ôćĺ    if isinstance(value, list):
   707Ôćĺ        return join_paragraphs(extract_simple_text(item) for item in value)
   708Ôćĺ    if isinstance(value, dict):
   709Ôćĺ        for key in ("text", "content", "value"):
   710Ôćĺ            if key in value and isinstance(value[key], str):
   711Ôćĺ                return value[key].strip()
   712Ôćĺ        return ""
   713Ôćĺ    return ""
   714Ôćĺ
   715Ôćĺ
   716Ôćĺdef extract_gemini_text(node: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
   717Ôćĺ    parts: list[str] = []
   718Ôćĺ    for candidate in (node.get("parts"), node.get("content"), node.get("text"), node.get("message")):
   719Ôćĺ        parts.extend(extract_gemini_parts(candidate))
   720Ôćĺ    return join_paragraphs(parts)
   721Ôćĺ
   722Ôćĺ
   723Ôćĺdef extract_gemini_parts(value: Any) -> list[str]:
   724Ôćĺ    if isinstance(value, str):
   725Ôćĺ        text = value.strip()
   726Ôćĺ        return [text] if text else []
   727Ôćĺ    if isinstance(value, list):
   728Ôćĺ        parts: list[str] = []
   729Ôćĺ        for item in value:
   730Ôćĺ            parts.extend(extract_gemini_parts(item))
   731Ôćĺ        return parts
   732Ôćĺ    if isinstance(value, dict):
   733Ôćĺ        block_type = str(value.get("type") or "").lower()
   734Ôćĺ        if block_type in SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES | TOOL_USE_TYPES | TOOL_RESULT_TYPES:
   735Ôćĺ            return []
   736Ôćĺ        if "text" in value and isinstance(value["text"], str):
   737Ôćĺ            text = value["text"].strip()
   738Ôćĺ            return [text] if text else []
   739Ôćĺ        parts: list[str] = []
   740Ôćĺ        for key in ("parts", "content"):
   741Ôćĺ            if key in value:
   742Ôćĺ                parts.extend(extract_gemini_parts(value[key]))
   743Ôćĺ        return parts
   744Ôćĺ    return []
   745Ôćĺ
   746Ôćĺ
   747Ôćĺdef find_first_mapping_with_keys(value: Any, keys: set[str]) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
   748Ôćĺ    if isinstance(value, dict):
   749Ôćĺ        if keys & set(value.keys()):
   750Ôćĺ            return value
   751Ôćĺ        for candidate in value.values():
   752Ôćĺ            result = find_first_mapping_with_keys(candidate, keys)
   753Ôćĺ            if result is not None:
   754Ôćĺ                return result
   755Ôćĺ        return None
   756Ôćĺ    if isinstance(value, list):
   757Ôćĺ        for candidate in value:
   758Ôćĺ            result = find_first_mapping_with_keys(candidate, keys)
   759Ôćĺ            if result is not None:
   760Ôćĺ                return result
   761Ôćĺ    return None
   762Ôćĺ
   763Ôćĺ
   764Ôćĺdef normalize_timestamp(value: Any, fallback: str | None = None) -> str:
   765Ôćĺ    if isinstance(value, (int, float)):
   766Ôćĺ        return (
   767Ôćĺ            datetime.fromtimestamp(float(value), tz=timezone.utc)
   768Ôćĺ            .replace(microsecond=0)
   769Ôćĺ            .isoformat()
   770Ôćĺ            .replace("+00:00", "Z")
   771Ôćĺ        )
   772Ôćĺ    if isinstance(value, datetime):
   773Ôćĺ        normalized = value.astimezone(timezone.utc) if value.tzinfo else value
   774Ôćĺ        return normalized.replace(microsecond=0).isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
   775Ôćĺ    if isinstance(value, str):
   776Ôćĺ        text = value.strip()
   777Ôćĺ        if not text:
   778Ôćĺ            return fallback or normalize_timestamp(datetime.now(timezone.utc))
   779Ôćĺ        iso_candidate = text[:-1] + "+00:00" if text.endswith("Z") else text
   780Ôćĺ        try:
   781Ôćĺ            parsed = datetime.fromisoformat(iso_candidate)
   782Ôćĺ            if parsed.tzinfo is not None:
   783Ôćĺ                parsed = parsed.astimezone(timezone.utc)
   784Ôćĺ            return parsed.replace(microsecond=0).isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
   785Ôćĺ        except ValueError:
   786Ôćĺ            return text
   787Ôćĺ    return fallback or normalize_timestamp(datetime.now(timezone.utc))
   788Ôćĺ
   789Ôćĺ
   790Ôćĺdef earliest_timestamp(current: str, candidate: Any) -> str:
   791Ôćĺ    normalized = normalize_timestamp(candidate, current)
   792Ôćĺ    current_dt = parse_iso_timestamp(current)
   793Ôćĺ    normalized_dt = parse_iso_timestamp(normalized)
   794Ôćĺ    if current_dt is not None and normalized_dt is not None:
   795Ôćĺ        return normalized if normalized_dt < current_dt else current
   796Ôćĺ    if normalized_dt is not None:
   797Ôćĺ        return normalized
   798Ôćĺ    return current or normalized
   799Ôćĺ
   800Ôćĺ
   801Ôćĺdef parse_iso_timestamp(value: str) -> datetime | None:
   802Ôćĺ    if not value:
   803Ôćĺ        return None
   804Ôćĺ    candidate = value[:-1] + "+00:00" if value.endswith("Z") else value
   805Ôćĺ    try:
   806Ôćĺ        parsed = datetime.fromisoformat(candidate)
   807Ôćĺ    except ValueError:
   808Ôćĺ        return None
   809Ôćĺ    if parsed.tzinfo is None:
   810Ôćĺ        return parsed.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
   811Ôćĺ    return parsed.astimezone(timezone.utc)
   812Ôćĺ
   813Ôćĺ
   814Ôćĺdef timestamp_partition(timestamp: str) -> tuple[str, str]:
   815Ôćĺ    try:
   816Ôćĺ        candidate = timestamp[:-1] + "+00:00" if timestamp.endswith("Z") else timestamp
   817Ôćĺ        parsed = datetime.fromisoformat(candidate)
   818Ôćĺ        return parsed.strftime("%Y"), parsed.strftime("%m")
   819Ôćĺ    except ValueError:
   820Ôćĺ        return "unknown", "unknown"
   821Ôćĺ
   822Ôćĺ
   823Ôćĺdef join_paragraphs(parts: Any) -> str:
   824Ôćĺ    cleaned = [str(part).strip() for part in parts if str(part).strip()]
   825Ôćĺ    return "\n\n".join(cleaned)
   826Ôćĺ
   827Ôćĺ
   828Ôćĺdef summarize_value(value: Any, limit: int = 180) -> str:
   829Ôćĺ    if value is None:
   830Ôćĺ        return "none"
   831Ôćĺ    if isinstance(value, str):
   832Ôćĺ        text = " ".join(value.split())
   833Ôćĺ        return truncate(text, limit)
   834Ôćĺ    try:
   835Ôćĺ        text = json.dumps(value, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True)
   836Ôćĺ    except TypeError:
   837Ôćĺ        text = str(value)
   838Ôćĺ    text = " ".join(text.split())
   839Ôćĺ    return truncate(text, limit)
   840Ôćĺ
   841Ôćĺ
   842Ôćĺdef truncate(text: str, limit: int) -> str:
   843Ôćĺ    return text if len(text) <= limit else text[: limit - 3] + "..."
   844Ôćĺ
   845Ôćĺ
   846Ôćĺdef yaml_escape(value: str) -> str:
   847Ôćĺ    escaped = value.replace("\\", "\\\\").replace('"', '\\"').replace("\n", "\\n")
   848Ôćĺ    return f'"{escaped}"'
   849Ôćĺ
   850Ôćĺ
   851Ôćĺdef discover_source_files(clients: set[str] | None = None) -> list[tuple[str, Path]]:
   852Ôćĺ    requested = clients or CLIENTS
   853Ôćĺ    roots = default_client_roots()
   854Ôćĺ    patterns = {
   855Ôćĺ        "codex": ["sessions/**/*.jsonl"],
   856Ôćĺ        "claude": ["projects/**/*.jsonl"],
   857Ôćĺ        "gemini": [
   858Ôćĺ            "tmp/*/checkpoints/**/*.json",
   859Ôćĺ            "tmp/*/checkpoints/**/*.jsonl",
   860Ôćĺ            "history/**/*.json",
   861Ôćĺ            "history/**/*.jsonl",
   862Ôćĺ            "chats/**/*.json",
   863Ôćĺ            "chats/**/*.jsonl",
   864Ôćĺ        ],
   865Ôćĺ    }
   866Ôćĺ    matches: list[tuple[str, Path]] = []
   867Ôćĺ    seen: set[str] = set()
   868Ôćĺ    for client in sorted(requested):
   869Ôćĺ        root = roots.get(client)
   870Ôćĺ        if root is None or not root.exists():
   871Ôćĺ            continue
   872Ôćĺ        for pattern in patterns[client]:
   873Ôćĺ            for path in root.glob(pattern):
   874Ôćĺ                if not path.is_file():
   875Ôćĺ                    continue
   876Ôćĺ                key = path.resolve().as_posix().lower()
   877Ôćĺ                if key in seen:
   878Ôćĺ                    continue
   879Ôćĺ                seen.add(key)
   880Ôćĺ                matches.append((client, path.resolve()))
   881Ôćĺ    matches.sort(
   882Ôćĺ        key=lambda item: (safe_file_mtime(item[1]), item[1].as_posix().lower()),
   883Ôćĺ        reverse=True,
   884Ôćĺ    )
   885Ôćĺ    return matches
   886Ôćĺ
   887Ôćĺ
   888Ôćĺdef infer_project_slug(parsed: ParsedTranscript) -> str:
   889Ôćĺ    if parsed.cwd:
   890Ôćĺ        try:
   891Ôćĺ            cwd_path = Path(parsed.cwd)
   892Ôćĺ            return slugify(cwd_path.name, fallback="project")
   893Ôćĺ        except OSError:
   894Ôćĺ            pass
   895Ôćĺ    if parsed.client == "claude":
   896Ôćĺ        parent_name = parsed.source_path.parent.name
   897Ôćĺ        parent_name = re.sub(r"^[a-z]--", "", parent_name.lower())
   898Ôćĺ        return slugify(parent_name, fallback="project")
   899Ôćĺ    if parsed.client == "gemini" and parsed.source_path.parent.name:
   900Ôćĺ        return slugify(parsed.source_path.parent.name, fallback="project")
   901Ôćĺ    return "unknown-project"
   902Ôćĺ
   903Ôćĺ
   904Ôćĺdef transcript_matches_repo(parsed: ParsedTranscript, repo_root: Path, repo_slug: str) -> bool:
   905Ôćĺ    repo_root = repo_root.resolve()
   906Ôćĺ    if parsed.cwd:
   907Ôćĺ        try:
   908Ôćĺ            cwd_path = Path(parsed.cwd).resolve()
   909Ôćĺ            if cwd_path == repo_root:
   910Ôćĺ                return True
   911Ôćĺ            if repo_root in cwd_path.parents:
   912Ôćĺ                return True
   913Ôćĺ        except OSError:
   914Ôćĺ            pass
   915Ôćĺ    return project_slugs_match(infer_project_slug(parsed), repo_slug)
   916Ôćĺ
   917Ôćĺ
   918Ôćĺdef project_slugs_match(left: str, right: str) -> bool:
   919Ôćĺ    return bool(left and right and left == right and left != "unknown-project")
   920Ôćĺ
   921Ôćĺ
   922Ôćĺdef safe_file_mtime(path: Path) -> float:
   923Ôćĺ    try:
   924Ôćĺ        return path.stat().st_mtime
   925Ôćĺ    except OSError:
   926Ôćĺ        return 0.0
   927Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ# Execution Environment
     2Ôćĺ
     3ÔćĺUse this file when MemoryTree needs to run a bundled Python script inside an arbitrary repository.
     4Ôćĺ
     5Ôćĺ## Goal
     6Ôćĺ
     7ÔćĺRun MemoryTree tooling without assuming the target repository already has a Python environment and without polluting the repository by default.
     8Ôćĺ
     9Ôćĺ## Preferred Order
    10Ôćĺ
    11Ôćĺ1. Use `uv run python ...` when `uv` is already available on the host machine.
    12Ôćĺ2. Otherwise use a working system `python`.
    13Ôćĺ3. If neither runner is available:
    14Ôćĺ   - for fresh init, fall back to direct template scaffolding from `assets/templates/`
    15Ôćĺ   - for upgrade or detection, fall back to conservative manual review and only make low-risk changes
    16Ôćĺ4. Ask the user before creating a project-local virtual environment, installing Python, or adding Python tooling files to the repository.
    17Ôćĺ
    18Ôćĺ## Why
    19Ôćĺ
    20Ôćĺ- MemoryTree is a repo-level memory workflow, not a language-specific build tool.
    21Ôćĺ- Many target repositories are not Python projects.
    22Ôćĺ- Auto-creating `.venv`, `pyproject.toml`, lockfiles, or other tooling files can pollute the host repository and conflict with its workflow.
    23Ôćĺ
    24Ôćĺ## Fresh Init
    25Ôćĺ
    26ÔćĺFor `scripts/init-memorytree.py` and first-run scaffolding:
    27Ôćĺ
    28Ôćĺ- Prefer running the script through `uv run python` or system `python`.
    29Ôćĺ- If no runner exists, create the initial files directly from `assets/templates/<locale>/`.
    30Ôćĺ- Do not block first-run installation only because Python is unavailable.
    31Ôćĺ
    32Ôćĺ## Upgrade And Detection
    33Ôćĺ
    34ÔćĺFor `scripts/upgrade-memorytree.py` and `scripts/detect-memorytree-locale.py`:
    35Ôćĺ
    36Ôćĺ- Prefer running the script through `uv run python` or system `python`.
    37Ôćĺ- If no runner exists, do not silently create a new environment inside the project.
    38Ôćĺ- Fall back to manual detection using the reference docs and keep the change set minimal.
    39Ôćĺ- If correct upgrade behavior depends on repo-specific policy interpretation, ask the user before proceeding.
    40Ôćĺ
    41Ôćĺ## Stop And Ask
    42Ôćĺ
    43ÔćĺStop and ask the user before environment setup when any of these are true:
    44Ôćĺ
    45Ôćĺ1. `uv` is unavailable and `python` is unavailable.
    46Ôćĺ2. Running the scripts would require creating a new `.venv` or installing host tooling.
    47Ôćĺ3. The repo has policies about local tooling, bootstrap scripts, or checked-in environment files.
    48Ôćĺ4. The upgrade is risky enough that manual fallback would be error-prone.
    49Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ# Git Policy
     2Ôćĺ
     3ÔćĺMemoryTree must adapt to the host repository. It does not get to override it.
     4Ôćĺ
     5Ôćĺ## Safe Defaults
     6Ôćĺ
     7Ôćĺ- Do not mix MemoryTree-owned changes with product code changes by default.
     8Ôćĺ- Do not stage or push unrelated user work.
     9Ôćĺ- Do not assume direct commits to protected branches are allowed.
    10Ôćĺ- Do not bypass review, CI, E2E, or release controls.
    11Ôćĺ- Keep raw transcript files in the current project's transcript mirror by default, but exclude them from automatic staging unless the user explicitly approved raw transcript uploads for the current repository.
    12Ôćĺ- Do not mirror or stage transcript files from unrelated projects inside the current repository.
    13Ôćĺ
    14Ôćĺ## Policy Merge
    15Ôćĺ
    16ÔćĺWhen the repo already has branch or PR rules:
    17Ôćĺ
    18Ôćĺ1. Keep the repo's stricter rule.
    19Ôćĺ2. Treat MemoryTree as documentation and process support.
    20Ôćĺ3. Only add MemoryTree-specific guidance that does not weaken repo controls.
    21Ôćĺ
    22Ôćĺ## MemoryTree-Owned Files
    23Ôćĺ
    24ÔćĺDefault whitelist:
    25Ôćĺ
    26Ôćĺ- `Memory/**`, except `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` until the user explicitly approved raw transcript uploads for this repository
    27Ôćĺ- `AGENTS.md` only when the file is managed by MemoryTree or the user approved the merge
    28Ôćĺ
    29ÔćĺIf the diff includes files outside this whitelist, stop and ask before staging or pushing.
    30Ôćĺ
    31Ôćĺ## Default MemoryTree Flow
    32Ôćĺ
    33ÔćĺUse this flow only for MemoryTree-only changes and only when the host repo does not forbid it:
    34Ôćĺ
    35Ôćĺ1. Stage only the MemoryTree-owned files created or updated by the skill.
    36Ôćĺ2. Create or reuse a dedicated branch such as `memorytree/<scope>-<yyyymmdd>-<slug>`.
    37Ôćĺ3. Use a MemoryTree-scoped commit title. Prefer `memorytree(<scope>): <subject>`, but if the host repo enforces a commit convention, use a compatible equivalent such as `docs(memorytree): <subject>`.
    38Ôćĺ4. Push that dedicated branch if the repository allows the current actor to push.
    39Ôćĺ5. Open a dedicated PR instead of merging directly into a protected branch.
    40Ôćĺ6. Enable auto-merge only when the repository still enforces its required approvals and checks.
    41Ôćĺ7. If transcript files are included, keep the PR scoped to one repository's transcript mirror only. Do not mix cross-project transcript archives into the same PR.
    42Ôćĺ8. Keep the global transcript archive updated in the same import operation, but never stage or push that user-level global archive as part of a repo PR.
    43Ôćĺ
    44Ôćĺ## Auto Push
    45Ôćĺ
    46ÔćĺWhen `auto_push = true` in `~/.memorytree/config.toml`:
    47Ôćĺ
    48Ôćĺ1. The heartbeat process pushes the current branch after each commit.
    49Ôćĺ2. Before pushing, verify that a Git remote is configured. If no remote exists, skip the push and write an alert to `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`.
    50Ôćĺ3. If a push fails (network, authentication, rejected by server), retry once. On second failure, write an alert and continue to the next project.
    51Ôćĺ4. On the very first push for a newly registered project, confirm with the user that the remote and branch are correct.
    52Ôćĺ5. Do not force-push. Use only fast-forward pushes.
    53Ôćĺ
    54ÔćĺWhen `auto_push = false`:
    55Ôćĺ
    56Ôćĺ1. The heartbeat commits locally but does not push.
    57Ôćĺ2. The user pushes manually or through the interactive skill session.
    58Ôćĺ
    59ÔćĺRationale: project memory is a user asset. Local-only storage risks data loss from hardware failure or accidental deletion. Automatic push to a remote provides a durable backup.
    60Ôćĺ
    61Ôćĺ## Commit Guidance
    62Ôćĺ
    63Ôćĺ- Keep the title concise and specific.
    64Ôćĺ- Prefer scopes such as `agents`, `goals`, `todos`, `chat-logs`, `transcripts`, `knowledge`, `archive`, `policy`, or `bootstrap`.
    65Ôćĺ- If a body is needed, keep it lightweight: reason, affected files, and whether the change is MemoryTree-only.
    66Ôćĺ- If the host repo requires Conventional Commits or another enforced prefix, keep `memorytree` visible as the scope or memory tag rather than bypassing the repo rule.
    67Ôćĺ
    68ÔćĺExample title:
    69Ôćĺ
    70Ôćĺ```text
    71Ôćĺmemorytree(todos): sync active todo progress
    72Ôćĺ```
    73Ôćĺ
    74ÔćĺHost-compatible example:
    75Ôćĺ
    76Ôćĺ```text
    77Ôćĺdocs(memorytree): sync active todo progress
    78Ôćĺ```
    79Ôćĺ
    80ÔćĺExample body:
    81Ôćĺ
    82Ôćĺ```text
    83ÔćĺReason:
    84Ôćĺ- align the active todo with confirmed progress
    85Ôćĺ
    86ÔćĺFiles:
    87Ôćĺ- Memory/02_todos/todo_v001_003_20260314.md
    88Ôćĺ- Memory/03_chat_logs/2026-03-14_09-30.md
    89Ôćĺ
    90ÔćĺNotes:
    91Ôćĺ- memorytree-only change
    92Ôćĺ- no product code included
    93Ôćĺ```
    94Ôćĺ
    95Ôćĺ## PR Guidance
    96Ôćĺ
    97Ôćĺ- Reuse the commit title as the PR title when it still describes the change accurately.
    98Ôćĺ- Keep the PR scoped to MemoryTree-owned files only.
    99Ôćĺ- State whether the PR is MemoryTree-only and whether auto-merge was enabled.
   100Ôćĺ- State whether raw transcripts were included or intentionally left unstaged in the repo mirror.
   101Ôćĺ- Follow the repository's required target branch, review policy, and CI gates.
   102Ôćĺ
   103Ôćĺ## Stop And Ask
   104Ôćĺ
   105ÔćĺStop and ask the user before committing, pushing, or opening a PR when any of these are true:
   106Ôćĺ
   107Ôćĺ1. The diff touches product code or files outside the MemoryTree whitelist.
   108Ôćĺ2. `AGENTS.md` has user-managed policy content that cannot be safely merged automatically.
   109Ôćĺ3. The target branch, base branch, or PR destination is unclear.
   110Ôćĺ4. The repository forbids bot pushes, automated PRs, or auto-merge.
   111Ôćĺ5. The repository's review or CI rules conflict with the default MemoryTree-only flow.
   112Ôćĺ6. Raw transcript upload permission for the repository is unknown.
   113Ôćĺ7. The diff includes raw transcripts or cleaned transcript indexes from other projects.
   114Ôćĺ8. `auto_push` is enabled but the target branch is a protected branch that refuses direct pushes.
   115Ôćĺ

     2Ôćĺ

     4Ôćĺ

    12Ôćĺ- Do not mirror or stage transcript files from unrelated projects inside the current repository.
    13Ôćĺ
    14Ôćĺ## Policy Merge
    15Ôćĺ
    16ÔćĺWhen the repo already has branch or PR rules:
    17Ôćĺ
    18Ôćĺ1. Keep the repo's stricter rule.
    19Ôćĺ2. Treat MemoryTree as documentation and process support.

    27Ôćĺ- `AGENTS.md` only when the file is managed by MemoryTree or the user approved the merge
    28Ôćĺ
    29ÔćĺIf the diff includes files outside this whitelist, stop and ask before staging or pushing.
    30Ôćĺ
    31Ôćĺ## Default MemoryTree Flow
    32Ôćĺ
    33ÔćĺUse this flow only for MemoryTree-only changes and only when the host repo does not forbid it:
    34Ôćĺ
    35Ôćĺ1. Stage only the MemoryTree-owned files created or updated by the skill.
    36Ôćĺ2. Create or reuse a dedicated branch such as `memorytree/<scope>-<yyyymmdd>-<slug>`.
    37Ôćĺ3. Use a MemoryTree-scoped commit title. Prefer `memorytree(<scope>): <subject>`, but if the host repo enforces a commit convention, use a compatible equivalent such as `docs(memorytree): <subject>`.
    38Ôćĺ4. Push that dedicated branch if the repository allows the current actor to push.
    39Ôćĺ5. Open a dedicated PR instead of merging directly into a protected branch.
    40Ôćĺ6. Enable auto-merge only when the repository still enforces its required approvals and checks.
    41Ôćĺ7. If transcript files are included, keep the PR scoped to one repository's transcript mirror only. Do not mix cross-project transcript archives into the same PR.
    42Ôćĺ8. Keep the global transcript archive updated in the same import operation, but never stage or push that user-level global archive as part of a repo PR.
    43Ôćĺ
    44Ôćĺ## Auto Push
    45Ôćĺ
    46ÔćĺWhen `auto_push = true` in `~/.memorytree/config.toml`:
    47Ôćĺ
    48Ôćĺ1. The heartbeat process pushes the current branch after each commit.
    49Ôćĺ2. Before pushing, verify that a Git remote is configured. If no remote exists, skip the push and write an alert to `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`.
    50Ôćĺ3. If a push fails (network, authentication, rejected by server), retry once. On second failure, write an alert and continue to the next project.
    51Ôćĺ4. On the very first push for a newly registered project, confirm with the user that the remote and branch are correct.
    52Ôćĺ5. Do not force-push. Use only fast-forward pushes.
    53Ôćĺ
    54ÔćĺWhen `auto_push = false`:
    55Ôćĺ
    56Ôćĺ1. The heartbeat commits locally but does not push.
    57Ôćĺ2. The user pushes manually or through the interactive skill session.
    58Ôćĺ
    59ÔćĺRationale: project memory is a user asset. Local-only storage risks data loss from hardware failure or accidental deletion. Automatic push to a remote provides a durable backup.
    60Ôćĺ
    61Ôćĺ## Commit Guidance
    62Ôćĺ
    63Ôćĺ- Keep the title concise and specific.
    64Ôćĺ- Prefer scopes such as `agents`, `goals`, `todos`, `chat-logs`, `transcripts`, `knowledge`, `archive`, `policy`, or `bootstrap`.
    65Ôćĺ- If a body is needed, keep it lightweight: reason, affected files, and whether the change is MemoryTree-only.
    66Ôćĺ- If the host repo requires Conventional Commits or another enforced prefix, keep `memorytree` visible as the scope or memory tag rather than bypassing the repo rule.
    67Ôćĺ
    68ÔćĺExample title:
    69Ôćĺ
    70Ôćĺ```text
    71Ôćĺmemorytree(todos): sync active todo progress
    72Ôćĺ```
    73Ôćĺ
    74ÔćĺHost-compatible example:
    75Ôćĺ
    76Ôćĺ```text
    77Ôćĺdocs(memorytree): sync active todo progress
    78Ôćĺ```
    79Ôćĺ
    80ÔćĺExample body:
    81Ôćĺ
    82Ôćĺ```text
    83ÔćĺReason:
    84Ôćĺ- align the active todo with confirmed progress
    85Ôćĺ
    86ÔćĺFiles:
    87Ôćĺ- Memory/02_todos/todo_v001_003_20260314.md
    88Ôćĺ- Memory/03_chat_logs/2026-03-14_09-30.md
    89Ôćĺ
    90ÔćĺNotes:
    91Ôćĺ- memorytree-only change
    92Ôćĺ- no product code included
    93Ôćĺ```
    94Ôćĺ
    95Ôćĺ## PR Guidance
    96Ôćĺ
    97Ôćĺ- Reuse the commit title as the PR title when it still describes the change accurately.
    98Ôćĺ- Keep the PR scoped to MemoryTree-owned files only.
    99Ôćĺ- State whether the PR is MemoryTree-only and whether auto-merge was enabled.
   100Ôćĺ- State whether raw transcripts were included or intentionally left unstaged in the repo mirror.
   101Ôćĺ- Follow the repository's required target branch, review policy, and CI gates.
   102Ôćĺ
   103Ôćĺ## Stop And Ask
   104Ôćĺ
   105ÔćĺStop and ask the user before committing, pushing, or opening a PR when any of these are true:
   106Ôćĺ
   107Ôćĺ1. The diff touches product code or files outside the MemoryTree whitelist.
   108Ôćĺ2. `AGENTS.md` has user-managed policy content that cannot be safely merged automatically.
   109Ôćĺ3. The target branch, base branch, or PR destination is unclear.
   110Ôćĺ4. The repository forbids bot pushes, automated PRs, or auto-merge.
   111Ôćĺ5. The repository's review or CI rules conflict with the default MemoryTree-only flow.
   112Ôćĺ6. Raw transcript upload permission for the repository is unknown.
   113Ôćĺ7. The diff includes raw transcripts or cleaned transcript indexes from other projects.
   114Ôćĺ8. `auto_push` is enabled but the target branch is a protected branch that refuses direct pushes.
   115Ôćĺ

   356Ôćĺclass PreserveExistingImportTimestampTests(unittest.TestCase):
